resign.example: He decided to resign from his job.

resistance.example_zh: 這個計畫遭到強烈的抵抗。

resolution.example: My New Year's resolution is to exercise.
resolution.example_zh: 我的新年新希望是運動。

resolution.example: They reached a quick resolution to the dispute.

resolve.example_zh: 他們和平地解決了問題。

respectable.example: He is a respectable member of the community.
respectable.example_zh: 他是社區裡受人尊敬的一員。

respectful.example: She is always respectful to her elders.
respectful.example_zh: 她對長輩總是很有禮貌。

restriction.example: There are restrictions on parking here.

retain.example: She managed to retain her calm.

retire.example: My grandfather will retire next year.

retreat.example: The army was forced to retreat.
They went on a quiet weekend retreat.
retreat.example_zh: 他們去一個安靜的地方度週末靜養。

reunion.example: We had a family reunion at New Year.

revenge.example: He sought revenge for the insult.
revenge.example_zh: 他為受到的侮辱尋求報復。

revise.example: She revised her essay before handing it in.
revise.example_zh: 她交作文前先修改了一遍。

revision.example: The plan needs a few revisions.
revision.example_zh: 這個計畫需要做些修改。

revolutionary.example: It was a revolutionary new idea.
revolutionary.example_zh: 那是個革命性的新點子。
那位革命者為變革而奮鬥。

reward.example: She gave the dog a reward for being good.
reward.example_zh: 她因狗乖巧而給了牠獎勵。

rhythm.example: The drummer kept a steady rhythm.

riddle.example: Can you solve this funny riddle?
riddle.example_zh: 你能解開這個有趣的謎語嗎？

robber.example: The robber ran away with the money.

romance.example: The movie is a sweet romance.
romance.example_zh: 這部電影是個甜美的愛情故事。

route.example: We took the fastest route home.
route.example_zh: 我們走最快的路線回家。

ruin.example: We visited the ruins of an old castle.
ruin.example_zh: 我們參觀了一座古堡的廢墟。

rural.example: Life is quiet in rural areas.
rural.example_zh: 鄉村地區的生活很安靜。

rusty.example: The old gate was rusty and creaky.
rusty.example_zh: 那道舊門生了鏽又嘎吱作響。

rusty.example: My English is a little rusty.

sacrifice.example: Parents make sacrifices for their children.
He sacrificed his free time to help others.
sacrifice.example_zh: 他犧牲空閒時間幫助別人。

satellite.example: A satellite sends signals to phones.
satellite.example_zh: 衛星把訊號傳送到手機。

satisfaction.example: She felt great satisfaction after finishing.

scarcely.example: I had scarcely sat down when the bell rang.

scold.example: His mother scolded him for being late.
scold.example_zh: 他媽媽因他遲到而責罵他。

scoop.example: She scooped some ice cream into a bowl.
scoop.example_zh: 她舀了一些冰淇淋到碗裡。

scoop.example: He ate two scoops of ice cream.

scratch.example: The cat made a scratch on the door.
scratch.example_zh: 貓在門上留下一道抓痕。

scratch.example: He scratched his head in confusion.

sculpture.example: The sculpture was carved from marble.
sculpture.example_zh: 這座雕塑是用大理石雕成的。

secure.example: Make sure the windows are secure.
He secured the boat to the dock.

seize.example: He seized the chance to speak.

settler.example: Early settlers built homes near the river.
settler.example_zh: 早期的移居者在河邊建家園。

sew.example: She sewed a button onto the coat.
sew.example_zh: 她在外套上縫了一顆鈕扣。

shade.example: We rested in the shade of a tree.
The wall is a light shade of blue.

shady.example: We found a shady spot for our picnic.
shady.example_zh: 我們找了一個陰涼的地方野餐。

shady.example: He is involved in some shady business.
shady.example_zh: 他涉及一些不正當的勾當。

shameful.example: It was shameful to cheat on the test.

shave.example: He went to the barber for a shave.

shelter.example: We took shelter under a roof during the rain.
shelter.example_zh: 下雨時我們到屋簷下避雨。

shelter.example: The trees shelter the house from wind.

shift.example: The nurse works the night shift.
He shifted the boxes to the corner.

sightseeing.example: We went sightseeing in the old city.

significance.example: The event has great historical significance.
significance.example_zh: 這事件有重大的歷史意義。

site.example: This is a good site for the new school.
site.example_zh: 這是蓋新學校的好地點。

site.example: I found it on a shopping site.
site.example_zh: 我在一個購物網站找到它。

sketch.example: She drew a quick sketch of the cat.
sketch.example_zh: 她快速畫了一張貓的素描。

skyscraper.example_zh: 這棟摩天大樓有八十層。

slight.example: There was a slight change in the plan.

socket.example: Plug the lamp into the socket.

software.example: She installed new software on her laptop.
software.example_zh: 她在筆電上安裝了新軟體。
